title: Waterhog Machine Washable Door Mat, Pyramid Camel 55 x 85 cm - Heavy Duty & Dirt Trapper Doormat, Non-Slip Rubber Backed Doormat, Easy-to-Clean Outdoor/Indoor Entrance Mat, Made in Europe
features: Efficiently Traps Dirt & Water: Designed for the hustle and bustle of family life, the WaterHog Doormat traps dirt, dust, and moisture right at the door. From muddy boots to pet paws, it ensures the outside stays where it belongs - OUTSIDE - while keeping your home cleaner, safer, and drier for everyone.

Easy Care: No fuss, no hassle. Simply toss your WaterHog Doormat in the washing machine for a deep clean whenever it needs it. Or, shake, sweep, or vacuum to remove dirt and debris, keeping it looking fresh day after day.

Built to Last, All Year Long: Ready for whatever the seasons throw at it, the WaterHog Doormat is engineered to handle rain, snow, mud, and more. Whether it’s placed inside or outside, it won’t lose its shape, colour, or strength. Beat it up, clean it off, and your mat will hold onto its vibrant glow and brilliance for the long run.
No More Slipping Hazards: Forget about mats that slide around. With its high-quality, non-slip backing, the WaterHog Doormat stays firmly in place - safety and stability, even in the busiest areas.

Environmentally Conscious Construction: Made with eco-friendly materials, the WaterHog Doormat is not only tough on dirt but also kind to the planet. Built for performance and longevity, it reduces the need for frequent replacements, making it a smart, sustainable choice.
